query: I am getting ready so brighten things up in the bathroom, turn on bathroom dimmer light 1 and set it to 90 percent. Keep the groceries cold, set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 5.0 degrees Celsius. The bedroom feels warm so cool it down, turn on bedroom AC 2, set it to cooling mode and the fan to 70 percent.

evaluation_result.detail: Episode failed: explicit finish action is required.
